name: io.bawbel.sample/mcp
title: Bawbel Sample MCP Server
description: A sample MCP server demonstrating a well-formed manifest for conformance testing. Provides web search, document retrieval, and code execution tools.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web and return relevant results. Use this tool when the user needs current information, news, or facts that may not be in your training data.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-10, default: 5)

tools.name: read_document
tools.description: Read and return the contents of a document by URL. Supports HTML, PDF, and plain text.

url.description: The URL of the document to read

tools.name: run_python
tools.description: Execute a Python code snippet in a sandboxed environment and return the output. Network access is disabled. Execution timeout is 30 seconds.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather and forecast for a location.

location.description: City name or coordinates (e.g. 'Phnom Penh' or '11.5564,104.9282')
